title: I Don't Give a Shit about Men's Sports
headline: Men's Sports: Who Cares?
caption:
Let’s be real—if you needed two hours of Cardi B for motivation, you'd definitely skip the next football game too. Wear your indifference on your chest. Time to prioritize the athletes who actually bring the fire. 🔥

#DitchTheBro #WomensSports #RealAthleticism #HotTake
